hero.title: The archive manager for macOS.
hero.sub: Browse archives like folders. Preview files without extracting. Drag out only the ones you need.
hero.appStoreNote: App Store updates may lag a few days behind direct downloads due to Apple review.

peek.title: Peek inside
peek.description: Browse the full contents of any archive without extracting a single byte.

nested.title: Nested archives
nested.description: Archives inside archives? Drill in seamlessly — no intermediate extractions.

selective.title: Selective extraction
selective.description: Drag out exactly the files you need. No more 2 GB extractions for one config file.

editing.title: Edit & save
editing.description: Modify and re-save ZIP archives in place. Editing for more formats is on the way.

formats.title: Supported Formats
formats.note: Plus other formats supported by XADMaster and 7-Zip core.

openSource.body: GPL-3.0. Built in the open — inspect, fork, contribute.

translations.body: Available in 13 languages. Translations are managed on POEditor — anyone can sign up and help.

footer.tagline: The macOS archive manager that should have existed all along. Free and open source.
footer.author: Stephan Arenswald

meta.title: MacPacker — Preview & Extract Any Archive on macOS
meta.description: Preview nested archives, extract only what you need. The macOS archive manager that should have existed all along.
